name: Rep. Mike Johnson
tweet: China’s deceit has cost the United States dearly, both in lives and livelihoods. More than three quarters of a million Americans have tested positive for COVID-19 and tragically, nearly 40,000 have lost their lives.

name: Rep. Mike Johnson
tweet: When faced with the initial outbreak of the novel coronavirus, China's communist regime made the deliberate choice to spread misinformation, suppress facts, and silence whistleblowers – misleading not only its own citizens about the severity of the virus, but the entire world.

name: Rep. Mike Johnson
